title: Simple, Low-Risk Business
objective: I wanted to figure out what kinds of simple businesses I could start with very little risk, time, or money.
summary: I explored a bunch of business ideas and compared how risky and easy to start each one seemed. I found that service-based work like tutoring, freelance writing, and house cleaning looked especially low-risk, and I got a better sense of which ideas would need more money or carry more liability.

entities.name: tutoring
entities.note: I evaluated tutoring as a low-risk business idea.

entities.name: freelance writing
entities.note: I considered freelance writing as a simple business to start with minimal risk.

entities.name: graphic design
